LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-29-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MALBROUGH MCKINLEY III'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. Motion To Transfer Venue
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant MALBROUGH MCKINLEY (Tel: 510-383-6239) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MALBROUGH MCKINLEY III's Motion To Transfer Venue.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

McKinley Marlbrough III's unopposed "motion for order transferring case to appropriate court (change of venue) [CCP 396b]" is granted. The case is transferred to Alameda County Superior Court.

Defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
